task:
/home/user/Documents/product_launch.pptx is open in LibreOffice Impress — a 5-slide product launch deck for 'Widget Pro'.

Make the following modifications:

1. Slide 1 ('Widget Pro'): change the subtitle from 'Launch Date: March 2025' to 'Launch Date: June 2025'.
2. Slide 2 ('Key Features'): add a new bullet 'AI-powered recommendations' after the existing bullets ('Real-time analytics dashboard', 'Cross-platform compatibility', 'Enterprise-grade security', '24/7 customer support'). Keep the existing bullets intact.
3. Slide 3 ('Pricing'): in the first bullet, change '$49.99/month' to '$39.99/month' so the bullet reads 'Starter Plan: $39.99/month'.
4. Slide 4 ('Go-to-Market Strategy'): add speaker notes 'Emphasize the 30-day free trial offer.'
5. Slide 5: change the title from 'Thank You' to 'Thank You & Next Steps' and add a new body line 'Visit widgetpro.com for early access.'

Save the file back to /home/user/Documents/product_launch.pptx. The deck must still have exactly 5 slides.

verification.description: Slide 1 contains updated launch date 'Launch Date: June 2025'
Slide 2 still contains original bullet 'Real-time analytics dashboard'
Slide 4 notes contain 'Emphasize the 30-day free trial offer'
Slide 5 contains updated title 'Thank You & Next Steps'
Slide 5 contains new body text about early access
